changes.before: She wanted back at the stones and kept asking whether we'd felt the bad patch in the lines on the north sweep.
changes.after: She wanted back at the stones, asking whether we'd felt the bad patch in the lines on the north sweep.
changes.rationale: Converted a short chained report line into a participial construction per the auditor's instruction while keeping Cyndia's plainspoken account intact.

changes.after: “Charming,” Sylvanas said, keeping her voice level. “Not especially.”
changes.rationale: Added connective tissue inside Sylvanas's dry reply without softening her clipped register.

changes.before: A guard brought it over, weathered leather tied with ordinary cord, and Sylvanas opened it herself, peeling back the flap with her thumb.
changes.after: A guard brought it over, weathered leather tied with ordinary cord. Sylvanas opened it herself, peeling back the flap with her thumb.
changes.rationale: Removed one coordinating join so the zone could gain connective tissue without driving compound density higher.

changes.before: Paper, more than she had expected: notes in a cramped hand blotted by cold or haste, charcoal rubbings of runes, sketches of the southern stones from several angles, each crossed with lines she did not need to understand to distrust. No ornamental nonsense, and no diplomatic letters tucked between the pages in case manners failed.
changes.after: Paper, more than she had expected: notes in a cramped hand blotted by cold or haste, charcoal rubbings of runes, sketches of the southern stones from several angles. Each sheet carried lines she did not need to understand to distrust, turning even the neatest marks into a warning. No ornamental nonsense, no diplomatic letters tucked between the pages in case manners failed.
changes.rationale: Split a stacked inventory into a cleaner scan, added one participial tail, and trimmed an unnecessary coordinating clause.

changes.before: One sheet had been folded and refolded until the edges softened, and Sylvanas opened it, smoothing the crease with her thumb.
changes.after: One sheet had been folded and refolded until the edges softened. Sylvanas opened it, smoothing the crease with her thumb.
changes.rationale: Cut another coordinating join while preserving the physical smoothing beat that carries the scene forward.

voice: Sylvanas stayed clipped and dry; no added line turns confessional or ornate.
Cyndia's report remains blunt field speech rather than polished explanation.
logic: Every added participial phrase describes an action or tone that can occur simultaneously with the main clause.
No new beat, prop, or location change was introduced outside the flagged exchange.
antiSlop: No new filter verbs, therapy language, or document-register phrasing entered the revised zone.
Participial additions are distributed across the window rather than clustered back to back.
residualConcerns: Global compound and semicolon rates remain slightly above the scorer ceiling, but the revised zone itself no longer produces flagged passages.
